memoryArtifacts.description: Origin Displayed: English - Spelling variations of this family name include: Audeley, Audley, Audeleye, Awdelye, Audeleygh, Aldeoalega, Audsley, Audless and many more. First found in Staffordshire, where they were seated from ancient times. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: John Audley, who sailed to Salem, Massachusetts in 1630; William Audley to Barbados in 1635; Margaret Audless to America in 1746; W.R. Audling to Baltimore in 1823. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009). This interesting name is of Anglo-Saxon origin, and is a locational surname deriving from the place called "Audley" near Lichfield in Staffordshire. The placename is recorded in the Domesday Book of 1086 C.E. as "Aldidelege", and in the Staffordshire Pipe Rolls of 1182 as "Aldithelega". The name means "Ealdgith's glade", derived from the Old English pre-7th Century female personal name "Ealdgith", composed of the elements "eald", old, and "gyth", battle, with "leah", this wood, galde, clearing. Locational surnames were usually acquired by those former inhabitants of a place who has moved to another area, and were thereafter best identified by the name of their birthplace. The marriage of John Audley and Frances Page was recorded at Tottenham in London on 22 September 1577. The first recorded spelling of the family name is shown to be that of Alice Audley (christening), which was dated 1225, Tunstall by Stoke upon Trent, Staffordshire, during the reign of King Henry 3rd, "The Frenchman", 1216 - 1272. Surnames became necessary when governments introduced personal taxation. In England this was known as Poll Tax. Throughout the centuries, surnames in every country have continued to "develop" often leading to astonishing variants of the original spelling.  Copyright: Name Origin Research www.surnamedb.com 1980 - 2014.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas 1st Lord Audley於1289年11月11日出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親Nicholas d'Audley31歲，母親Katherine de Giffard16歲。他於1312年與Joan Martin在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1316年11月28日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾馬哈苗利享年27歲，埋葬在英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas 1st Lord Audley于1289年11月11日出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Nicholas d'Audley31岁，母亲Katherine de Giffard16岁。他于1312年与Joan Martin在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1316年11月28日在英国英格兰史洛普爾馬哈苗利享年27岁，埋葬在英国戴文巴恩斯塔普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas 1st Lord Audley was born on 11 November 1289, in Staffordshire, England, his father, Nicholas d'Audley, was 31 and his mother, Katherine de Giffard, was 16. He married Joan Martin in 1312, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 28 November 1316, in Marchamley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27, and was buried in Barnstaple, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas 1st Lord Audley est né le 11 novembre 1289, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas d'Audley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Giffard, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Joan Martin en 1312, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 novembre 1316, à Marchamley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas 1st Lord Audley am 11. November 1289 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas d'Audley 31 und seine Mutter Katherine de Giffard 16. Er hat 1312 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Martin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. November 1316 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Marchamley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Barnstaple, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas 1st Lord Audley è nato il il 11 novembre 1289 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas d'Audley, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Giffard, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Joan Martin nel 1312, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 novembre 1316, nel Marchamley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Barnstaple, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas 1st Lord Audleyが1289年11月11日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Nicholas d'Audleyは31歳，母Katherine de Giffardは16歳であった。1312年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでJoan Martinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1316年11月28日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアマルチャムリーで27歳で死去し，イギリスデボンバーンスタプルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas 1st Lord Audley(이)가 1289년 11월 11일 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas d'Audley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Giffard(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Joan Martin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 11월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 마챔리에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 바른스타플에 묻혔다.

pt.11 November 1289–28 November 1316: 11 de novembro de 1289–28 de novembro de 1316
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas 1st Lord Audley nasceu em 11 de novembro de 1289, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas d'Audley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Giffard, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Martin em 1312, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1316, em Marchamley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas 1st Lord Audley родился 11 ноября 1289 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas d'Audley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Giffard, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Martin в 1312 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 ноября 1316 г. в местности марчамли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия.

es.11 November 1289–28 November 1316: 11 de noviembre de 1289–28 de noviembre de 1316
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas 1st Lord Audley nació el 11 de noviembre de 1289, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas d'Audley, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Katherine de Giffard, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Joan Martin en 1312, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de noviembre de 1316, en Marchamley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultado en Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra.
